mapper.sql: select a.id, a.odd_number, a.planned_production_id, c.plan_number, b.serial_no, f.material_name, f.material_model, f.material_specifications, f.material_unit, b.produced_quantity, b.manufacture_date, a.applicant, g.user_name as applicant_name, a.applicant_date, a.applicant_status, a.reviewer, h.user_name as reviewer_name, a.reviewer_date, a.reviewer_status, a.status, a.review_comments, a.collection_date, a.remark from mes_material_apply a
mapper.select: select a.id, a.odd_number, a.planned_production_id, c.serial_no, f.material_name, f.material_model, f.material_specifications, f.material_unit, c.produced_quantity, c.manufacture_date, a.applicant, a.applicant_date, a.applicant_status, a.reviewer, a.reviewer_date, a.reviewer_status, a.status, a.review_comments, a.collection_date, a.remark, b.id as sub_id, b.apply_id as sub_apply_id, b.material_id as sub_material_id, g.material_name as sub_material_name, g.material_model as sub_material_model, g.material_specifications as sub_material_specifications, g.material_unit as sub_material_unit, b.dosage as sub_dosage, b.received_quantity as sub_received_quantity, b.remark as sub_remark from mes_material_apply a left join mes_material_apply_item b on b.apply_id = a.id left join mes_planned_production c on a.planned_production_id = c.id left join mes_bom d on c.bom_id = d.id left join mes_product e on d.product_id = e.id left join wms_material f on e.material_id = f.id left join wms_material g on b.material_id = g.id where a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into mes_material_apply
odd_number, planned_production_id, collection_date, applicant, applicant_date, applicant_status, reviewer, reviewer_date, reviewer_status, review_comments, status, remark,
#{oddNumber}, #{plannedProductionId}, #{collectionDate}, #{applicant}, #{applicantDate}, #{applicantStatus}, #{reviewer}, #{reviewerDate}, #{reviewerStatus}, #{reviewComments}, #{status}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from mes_material_apply where id in
#{id}

delete from mes_material_apply_item where apply_id in
#{applyId}
mapper.insert:
insert into mes_material_apply_item( id, apply_id, material_id, dosage, received_quantity, remark) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.applyId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.dosage}, #{item.receivedQuantity}, #{item.remark})
